title: podman farm: unhide
body:
Followup to #20819 (move --farm option to podman farm build).

Remove the Hidden setting for podman farm, and enable man page
cross-checks.

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED] -- the man-page xref is what we're testing

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>
```release-note
None
```

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *edsantiago* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [edsantiago] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
Commands/options are missing shell completion functions.

@umohnani8 when convenient could you please add completion?
```
    shell_completion_test.go:43: podman.test farm build command has no shell completion function set
    shell_completion_test.go:66: podman.test farm build --farm flag has no shell completion function set
    shell_completion_test.go:66: podman.test farm build --platforms flag has no shell completion function set
--- FAIL: TestShellCompletionFunctions (0.03s)
```
I am close to finishing the farm build rewrite, can we wait for me to open that PR before unhiding this command?
Of course. My apologies, I was out of the loop and unaware of the rewrite.
